name: Chicken Marengo
recipeIngredient: 1 (2 1/2 lbs each) boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs
3 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken pieces in a plastic bag and coat with flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat oil and butter in a 12-cup flameproof casserole or large skillet over medium heat. Brown chicken in batches until browned on all sides; remove and set aside.
3. In the same pan, sauté onion and garlic in drippings until soft. Stir in wine and brandy, then bring to a boil. Stir in chopped tomatoes and arrange browned chicken pieces in the casserole. Pour sauce over the chicken.
4. Tie a bouquet garni of parsley, bay leaf, and thyme in cheesecloth; place it in the casserole and push down into the sauce. Cover.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Stir in sliced mushrooms or canned mushrooms and liquid (if using fresh mushrooms, sauté them first in butter). Continue baking for an additional 15 minutes until chicken is tender. Remove bouquet garni before serving.
Source: Family Circle "301 Splendid Casseroles", January 1976
